title: Nursery Rhyme. DXXXVII. Natural History.
content:
As I went to Bonner,
            I met a pig
            Without a wig,
    Upon my word and honour.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. DXXXVII. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
